name: Strawberry Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Cream Filling by mixing together sugar, milk, cornstarch, enriched flour, salt, and vanilla in a saucepan. Gradually stir in beaten egg, then continue stirring until thickened. Stir some of the hot mixture into the egg before adding remaining hot mixture. Bring to a boil and cool slightly before chilling.
2. Prepare the Glaze by crushing remaining berries with water, cooking for 2 minutes, sieving, and mixing sugar and cornstarch. Gradually stir in berry juice until thick and clear. Adjust color as desired.
3. Toast almonds lightly browned, then sprinkle over cooled pie crust.
4. Fill the prepared crust with chilled Cream Filling.
5. Halve 2 cups of strawberries and place atop filling.
6. Pour glaze over halved strawberries and refrigerate until serving time.
7. Serve with whipped cream if desired.
